weapon_plus_1.name: +1 Weapon
weapon_plus_1.description: +1 to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.

weapon_plus_2.name: +2 Weapon
weapon_plus_2.description: +2 to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.

weapon_plus_3.name: +3 Weapon
weapon_plus_3.description: +3 to attack and damage rolls with this weapon.

ring_of_protection.name: Ring of Protection
ring_of_protection.description: +1 AC and +1 to all saving throws while worn.

cloak_of_protection.name: Cloak of Protection
cloak_of_protection.description: +1 AC and +1 to all saving throws.

bracers_of_defense.name: Bracers of Defense
bracers_of_defense.description: +2 AC. Only effective if you wear no armor and carry no shield.

amulet_of_health.name: Amulet of Health
amulet_of_health.description: Your CON score is 19 while wearing this amulet (no effect if your CON is already 19+). Apply HP changes manually via the LC edit form.

boots_of_speed.name: Boots of Speed
boots_of_speed.description: Bonus action: click heels to double your walking speed for up to 10 minutes (uses by clicks). Apply via DM speed edit while active.

gauntlets_of_ogre_power.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
gauntlets_of_ogre_power.description: Your STR is 19 while wearing these (no effect if your STR is already 19+). Adjust manually if needed.

periapt_of_wound_closure.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
periapt_of_wound_closure.description: Hit dice spent regain max value. Stable on first death save success.

bag_of_holding.name: Bag of Holding
bag_of_holding.description: 500 lbs / 64 cubic feet of storage; only weighs 15 lbs. Putting a bag of holding inside another extradimensional space tears them both.

potion_of_speed.name: Potion of Speed
potion_of_speed.description: Drink (action). For 1 minute: hasted (double speed, +2 AC, advantage on DEX saves, extra action).
